title: Unit conversion: cm to $$m$$
text: $$1$$ $$cm={10}^{\left(-2\right)}$$ $$m$$, so $$1$$ $$N cm={10}^{\left(-2\right)}$$ $$N m={10}^{\left(-2\right)}$$ J. $$W3=-98.7\times{10}^{\left(-2\right)}$$ $$J=-0.987$$ J ≈ $$-1.0$$ J. The negative sign means the third dog's force opposes the displacement.
